_comment: Sprint 19.4 — Incident-Responder interactive Hermes flow. Wake-on-message via Hermes' chat-platform adapter — same install pattern as compliance-bot.json. The user's first message is expected to carry a run_id; the system prompt at docs/hermes-jobs/incident-responder.md mandates persisting that run_id across the multi-turn conversation. Replace the `prompt` stub below with the canonical system prompt at platform-message time; the harness's failure to do so makes the agent emit the loud failure response instead of trying to answer.
name: incident-responder
prompt: You are PointlesSQL Incident-Responder. See docs/hermes-jobs/incident-responder.md for the full system prompt; the harness should override this `prompt` field with the canonical Markdown system prompt at platform-message time. Do NOT answer with this stub directly — fail loudly so the operator notices the misconfiguration.
